meaning: n.[鸟]雨燕,(梳棉机等的)大滚筒adj.迅速的,快的,敏捷的,立刻的adv.迅速地,敏捷地
examples: With a swift movement, Matthew Jerrold sat upright.
After the election there was a swift transfer of power.
Our task is to challenge the U.N. to make a swift decision.
Bad news travels and Scotland's literary scene is small enough to make it swift.
"This is the most amazing burst Swift has seen, " said lead scientist Dr Neil Gehrels.
